ddls:
CREATE TABLE "racing_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the racing event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track where the event took place */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing series */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Qualifying, Race) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "number_of_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the event */,
  "track_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the track (e.g., Dry, Wet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_events_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racing_events_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES racing_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  "track_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the track (e.g., Grand Prix, Sprint) */,
  "number_of_turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the track */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track (e.g., Asphalt, Concrete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "driver_age" INTEGER /* Age of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the driver belongs to */,
  "driver_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "driver_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "driver_height" REAL /* Height of the driver in meters */,
  "driver_weight" REAL /* Weight of the driver in kilograms */,
  "driver_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the driver */,
  "driver_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the driver's photo */,
  "driver_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the driver */,
  "driver_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the driver in the current season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  "team_chief" TEXT /* Name of the team chief */,
  "team_country" TEXT /* Country of the team */,
  "team_founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the current season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grand_prix" (
  "grand_prix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Grand Prix event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racing event */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver participating in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team participating in the event */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the event */,
  "grid" INTEGER /* Grid position of the driver in the event */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the driver to complete the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car used by the driver */,
  "fastest_lap" TEXT /* Fastest lap time of the driver in the event */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops made by the driver */,
  "tyre_compound" TEXT /* Tyre compound used by the driver */,
  "fuel_strategy" TEXT /* Fuel strategy used by the driver */,
  "incident_count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents involving the driver */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties received by the driver */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver at the end of the event (e.g., Finished, DNF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grand_prix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grand_prix_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES racing_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grand_prix_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grand_prix_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grand_prix_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racing_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racing series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing series */,
  "series_type" TEXT /* Type of the racing series (e.g., Formula 1, IndyCar) */,
  "series_description" TEXT /* Description of the racing series */,
  "series_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the racing series */,
  "series_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the racing series */,
  "number_of_events" INTEGER /* Number of events in the series */,
  "series_champion" TEXT /* Current champion of the series */,
  "series_points_leader" TEXT /* Driver leading in points */,
  "series_top_team" TEXT /* Top team in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car */,
  "car_model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "car_engine" TEXT /* Engine of the car */,
  "car_team" INTEGER /* Reference to the team using the car */,
  "car_year" TEXT /* Year the car was built */,
  "car_weight" REAL /* Weight of the car in kilograms */,
  "car_top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the car in kilometers per hour */,
  "car_horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car */,
  "car_torque" REAL /* Torque of the car in Newton meters */,
  "car_fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel capacity of the car in liters */,
  "car_aerodynamics" TEXT /* Aerodynamic features of the car */,
  "car_suspension" TEXT /* Suspension type of the car */,
  "car_brakes" TEXT /* Brake type of the car */,
  "car_transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_car_team FOREIGN KEY ("car_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team owner, driver, racing official) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "user_account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
